_note: Per-stage launch kernel (RING_ATTN_PER_STAGE_KERNEL=1) — N kernel launches per ring stage, 16 stages. Same variant cx7 figure uses. EFA proxy backend, 2 warmup + 5 iters, max-gpu. M=196608: 138.047 ms = 574 TFLOPS, matches cx7's 138.438 ms / 572 TFLOPS within noise — fabric difference was an artifact of variant mismatch.
